conversation.message_text: LensDirect: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from LensDirect.
LensDirect: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/x7_

LensDirect: Welcome! Save big when you shop now with AW10657F0 for 20% off all contacts and 25% off all sunglasses, eyewear and lens replacement! https://lensdirect.attn.tv/aNsiN1FDNqS1 

You can also text back any time with questions and Jordan will be here to help!
LensDirect: Save our contact for exclusive offers!
Ib tried to use the code for 25% off but it didn't work?
LensDirect: Sorry about that! Can I please have a screenshot of the error message you're seeing from your end and the item/s you have on your cart so I can check?
I also have a $20 reward but it's not applying to my order when checking out
Code: AW10657F0
LensDirect: I'm sorry to hear that! Is there a code for the $20 discount?
The code I just gave is for 25%
Why didn't that work?
The $20 is a reward
LensDirect: I'm sorry, the screenshots were delayed! Upon checking, you're purchasing a sale item, therefore, additional discount codes cannot be applied. I hope this clarifies!
Are you guys having any similar or bigger sales coming up this memorial day or father's day?
What about my $20 reward that should be applied to my account at checkout,,
LensDirect: I apologize, but rewards are considered as a discount, and as mentioned discounts and sales cannot be combined.
Awwwww mannnn
LensDirect: Really sorry about that! Let me know if there's anything else I can help you with.

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items
